mcu_revenue_scope: 微控制器及模拟产品线（年报分产品表直接披露，与NOR Flash和传感器完全独立）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: MCU & Analog product line (directly from annual report segment table, separate from NOR Flash and sensors)
auto_mcu_note: 已与国内头部Tier1合作开发，车规样品进入测试，无规模收入
auto_mcu_note_en: Co-developing with top domestic Tier-1; automotive samples in testing, no volume revenue yet

mcu_revenue_scope: 工业控制芯片（年报分产品表直接披露；含工规MCU+BMIC电池管理芯片；不含消费电子分类下的AMOLED显示驱动；注意：图表2023用此口径，2024-2025图表切换为纯工规MCU估算，本数据库统一使用工业控制口径）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Industrial control chips (annual report segment table; incl. industrial MCU + BMIC; excludes consumer AMOLED display drivers; DB uses industrial control scope consistently)
auto_mcu_note: 首颗车规MCU 2023年实现小量销售，2024-2025爬坡中
auto_mcu_note_en: First automotive MCU small-volume sales in 2023; ramping 2024–2025

mcu_revenue_scope: 芯片业务总营收（非MCU业务<1%，总收入直接用作MCU收入）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Total chip business revenue (non-MCU <1%; total revenue used directly as MCU revenue)
auto_mcu_note: 工控汽车事业部存在，车规产品处于客户导入阶段
auto_mcu_note_en: Industrial/automotive division exists; automotive products in customer qualification

mcu_revenue_scope: ⚠ 口径提醒（来自2026年H股招股说明书）：本列为「芯片产品」收入，含通用MCU+专业市场芯片（安全MCU/USB Key）+BMS芯片+RF芯片，非纯MCU口径。灼识咨询估算纯通用MCU约占芯片产品收入90%（2024年约5亿元）。
mcu_revenue_scope_en: ⚠ Scope note (2026 H-share prospectus): Chip Products revenue incl. general MCU + secure MCU/USB Key + BMS + RF; not pure MCU. CIC estimates general MCU ~90% of chip products (~¥500M in 2024).
auto_mcu_note: N32G45x系列小批量试产，车规研发投入3.5亿，无规模收入
auto_mcu_note_en: N32G45x pilot production; ¥350M automotive R&D spend, no volume revenue

core_ip: 自研电机控制处理器内核（非ARM授权）
mcu_revenue_scope: MCU/ASIC合计（年报无产品线收入拆分，按总收入×0.67估算；不含HVIC驱动芯片、MOSFET功率器件、IPM智能功率模块）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: MCU/ASIC combined (no segment breakdown; total revenue × 0.67; excludes HVIC drivers, MOSFETs, IPM modules)
auto_mcu_note: AEC-Q100车规认证已通过，2024年车规占营收7.35%≈0.7亿元

mcu_revenue_scope: 极海微电子子公司营收（从纳思达集团年报集成电路分部提取；集团总收入264亿含打印耗材完全不可用；禁止填入集团总收入）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Geehy Micro subsidiary revenue (from Nasda group IC segment; group ¥26.4B incl. printer supplies must not be used)
auto_mcu_note: 车规MCU已在新能源汽车BMS、智能车灯控制领域批量出货
auto_mcu_note_en: Automotive MCU in volume for EV BMS and smart headlight control

mcu_revenue_scope: 智能电表芯片产品线（年报直接披露；含智能电表MCU、通用MCU、车规MCU及相关模组；与FPGA和安全芯片分开列示）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Smart meter IC product line (annual report; incl. meter MCU, general MCU, automotive MCU and modules; separate from FPGA and security chips)
auto_mcu_note: 车规MCU量产导入阶段，收入体量小，含在智能电表芯片产品线内
auto_mcu_note_en: Automotive MCU in production ramp; small revenue, included in smart meter IC line

mcu_revenue_scope: MCU产品线（年报直接拆分NOR Flash / MCU两段，含毛利率；注意：可能含VCM Driver音圈马达驱动，需确认年报MCU行边界）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: MCU product line (annual report NOR Flash / MCU split with gross margin; may include VCM driver — confirm MCU line boundary)
auto_mcu_note: 256MB产品进入AEC-Q100认证阶段，尚未规模量产
auto_mcu_note_en: 256MB product in AEC-Q100 certification; not yet in volume production

mcu_revenue_scope: MCU相关收入估算（total_revenue×0.45，来源IR活动记录表；年报无MCU分类；2024全年=7.02亿（非6.12亿三季报））
mcu_revenue_scope_en: MCU-related revenue estimate (total revenue × 0.45, IR records; no MCU segment in annual report; 2024 full year ¥702M not Q3 ¥612M)
auto_mcu_note: 有车规产品，处于AEC-Q100认证阶段
auto_mcu_note_en: Automotive products exist; in AEC-Q100 certification

mcu_revenue_scope: 计量MCU/SoC芯片（total_revenue×约0.34估算；不含计量模块和系统解决方案；应用场景单一为电力计量，与通用MCU口径差异大）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Metering MCU/SoC (total revenue × ~0.34; excludes metering modules and system solutions; power metering only — differs from general MCU scope)
auto_mcu_note: 专注电力计量，不涉及汽车MCU
auto_mcu_note_en: Power metering focus; no automotive MCU

mcu_revenue_scope: 芯片收入（年报区分芯片/模组两段，不含模组；注意：产品兼具MCU+WiFi SoC属性，部分分析师归类为SoC）
mcu_revenue_scope_en: Chip revenue (annual report chip/module split, excludes modules; MCU + WiFi SoC — some analysts classify as SoC)
auto_mcu_note: 主营AIoT无线MCU，不涉及车规市场
auto_mcu_note_en: AIoT wireless MCU focus; no automotive market
